title: Shared Schema Package Phase 2 Through Phase 7 Contracts
description: Canonical JSON Schema source for SUB BUILD PLAN #7 Phase 2 package layout/common primitives, Phase 3 Phase 0/1 contract modules, Phase 4 generation toolchain/projection metadata, Phase 5 strict validation metadata, Phase 6 deterministic fixture/golden/artifact metadata, and Phase 7 compatibility/deprecation/migration gate metadata.
